semantic.role: Infrastructure module providing a managed SQLite runtime database for the ArchSpine system. Handles database file creation, WAL recovery, and provides a simple open/readonly interface.
responsibilities: Open and initialize a runtime SQLite database using better-sqlite3.
Ensure the database directory exists by creating it if necessary.
Perform WAL recovery via recoverStaleWal before opening to prevent corruption.
Map database errors via mapRuntimeDbError for consistent error handling.
Support optional readonly mode via the opts parameter.
outOfScope: Connection pooling or transaction lifecycle management.
invariants: All runtime database access must go through the openRuntimeDatabase function and RuntimeDatabase interface.
No caller should directly instantiate better-sqlite3 or reach into internal modules like ./wal-recovery.js when a stable facade exists.
The database directory must be writable unless readonly mode is enabled.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a stable, managed runtime database layer that abstracts SQLite initialization, WAL recovery, and error mapping, serving as the single entrance point for runtime persistence.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the v1.0.0 release that introduces architectural governance and a semantic layer for the AI era; this module provides the foundational database access for runtime state.

publicSurface.description: Interface representing an opened runtime database. Contains the underlying better-sqlite3 Database instance and the file path of the database.
Opens a runtime SQLite database at a path within rootDir. Creates the directory if needed, performs WAL recovery, and returns a RuntimeDatabase instance. Supports a readonly option.

English.role: Infrastructure module providing a managed SQLite runtime database for the ArchSpine system. Handles database file creation, WAL recovery, and provides a simple open/readonly interface.
responsibilities: Open and initialize a runtime SQLite database using better-sqlite3.
Ensure the database directory exists by creating it if necessary.
Perform WAL recovery via recoverStaleWal before opening to prevent corruption.
Map database errors via mapRuntimeDbError for consistent error handling.
Support optional readonly mode via the opts parameter.
outOfScope: Connection pooling or transaction lifecycle management.

exports.name: openRuntimeDatabase
exports.signature:
openRuntimeDatabase(
  rootDir: string,
  opts?: { readonly?: boolean },
)
